title: Apple hires ex-Google executive to head AI marketing amid push to improve Siri
description: Apple on Friday ​said it has ‌hired Lilian Rincon, who previously spent ​nearly a decade ​at Google overseeing its ⁠shopping and ​assistant products, as the ​vice president of product marketing for artificial ​intelligence, reporting to ​its marketing chief Greg “Joz” ‌Joswiak.
content: SAN FRANCISCO, March 27 (Reuters) - Apple (AAPL.O), opens new tab on Friday ​said it has ‌hired Lilian Rincon, who previously spent ​nearly a decade ​at Google overseeing its ⁠shopping and ​assistant products, as the ​vice president of product market... [375 chars]

title: AI’s arrival complicates Big Tech climate goals, and some worry it’s locking in more fossil fuels
description: The race to deploy artificial intelligence is complicating tech companies' commitments to reduce greenhouse gas emissions, most of which come from the burning of gas, oil and coal and drive climate change. They
content:

title: AI’s arrival complicates Big Tech climate goals, and some worry it’s locking in more fossil fuels
description: The race to deploy artificial intelligence is complicating tech companies' commitments to reduce greenhouse gas emissions, most of which come from the burning of gas, oil and coal and drive climate change. They
content:
By TAMMY WEBBER
